name: Protein World Ltd.
description: Protein World offers a high-quality Whey Protein Concentrate, providing over 30g of protein per serving and derived from grass-fed cows. This protein is a complete source, containing all 9 essential amino acids, making it a premium choice for those seeking effective nutrition.

name: Protein World
description: Protein World offers Whey Protein Isolate, which is their highest protein and fastest absorbing product, providing 33g of protein per serving while being low in sugar and fat.

name: Fuelled
description: Fuelled Whey offers a high-quality whey protein that is both delicious and effective, containing 24 grams of protein per serving to aid in recovery and muscle building. Trusted by athletes and fitness coaches, it is rigorously tested for quality, making it a preferred choice for those pursuing their health and fitness goals.

name: WHEYD
description: WHEYD offers a premium selection of whey protein powders, including lactose-free options, sourced from Irish, grass-fed, and hormone-free cows. Their products provide 20g of protein per 24g serving, boasting higher levels of BCAAs than competitors.

name: Schreiber Foods
description: Schreiber Foods emphasizes its commitment to quality and innovation in food products, including organic powders with whey protein, which highlights their role as a key ingredient in their customers' success. Their focus on food safety and product excellence ensures they meet the needs of retailers, restaurants, and food manufacturers globally.

name: nzmp
description: NZMP offers Pro-Optima™ Whey Protein Concentrate, which is specifically designed for protein-enhanced yogurts, highlighting the company's focus on innovative dairy ingredients that promote healthy living.

name: PROTYZE
description: Protyze Clear Whey Isolate is an excellent choice for those seeking a high-quality protein supplement, offering 3.8 grams of leucine to support muscle protein synthesis and recovery. Its microfiltration process ensures low fat and lactose content, making it suitable for those with lactose intolerance.

name: All Nutrition
description: The company offers Whey 3W Super, a high-quality whey protein designed to enhance muscle recovery, making it an excellent choice for those looking to increase their protein intake.

name: CP Kelco
description: CP Kelco offers microparticulated whey protein concentrate, a dairy ingredient utilized in various foods and beverages. With nearly 90 years of experience, the company specializes in nature-based ingredient solutions that cater to consumer needs and enhance product offerings.

name: Whey Protein Store
description: Whey Protein Store is a leading online supplement retailer in India, offering a wide range of authentic whey protein products. Their commitment to quality and fast delivery ensures customers receive trusted supplements directly from the source.
